extDescription.message: Save web images and page screenshots as PNG, JPG, or WebP locally, with optional copy path and local history.

notifySaveFailedNoImageUrl.message: Chrome did not provide an image URL for this item.

errorNoImageUrl.message: This page did not expose a usable image URL.

errorUnableReadImage.message: Unable to read this image. Some blob or protected images may be blocked on this page.

errorUnableReadFileImage.message: Unable to read this local image. Make sure the image is visible on the page and file URL access is allowed for this extension.

errorFileUrlAccessRequired.message: Local file access is disabled. Open the extension details page and enable Allow access to file URLs.

errorImageNotLoaded.message: The selected image is not fully loaded.

errorCanvasUnavailable.message: Canvas is unavailable on this page.

errorMissingFinalPath.message: Chrome did not expose the final local file path.

errorScreenshotNoTab.message: Chrome did not provide a usable tab for this screenshot.

errorScreenshotAlreadyRunning.message: A screenshot is already running on this tab.

errorScreenshotMetricsUnavailable.message: Unable to read this page's screenshot size.

errorScreenshotTabChanged.message: Screenshot stopped because the active tab changed.

errorScreenshotEmpty.message: This page produced an empty screenshot.

errorScreenshotTooLargeEdge.message: This page is too large for one image. Max edge is $EDGE$px.

errorScreenshotTooLargePixels.message: This page is too large to capture as one image safely.

errorScreenshotScrollStalled.message: The page could not scroll far enough to finish the long screenshot.

notifySavedAndCopiedMessage.message: Saved as $FORMAT$ and copied file path.

notifySavedCopyFailedMessage.message: Saved as $FORMAT$, but copying file path failed: $ERROR$

notifyInterruptedMessage.message: The download was interrupted before the file path could be copied.

optionsIntro.message: A fully local image and page screenshot save-as extension. This release keeps the essentials: export quality, silent save, and local save history.

heroNote.message: Right-click an image or page. Pick a format. Save fast. Keep the path when needed.

panelLanguageBody.message: Follow the browser interface language by default, or override it here explicitly.

panelQualityBody.message: PNG is always lossless. JPG and WebP use the quality values below, from 0.10 to 1.00.

panelSaveModeBody.message: When enabled, the extension saves silently. Files go to the browser's default Downloads folder.

panelHistoryBody.message: History is stored in local browser storage only, with no remote service and no sqlite. Open it on demand from the button below.

historyEmpty.message: No save history yet. It will appear here after your first save.
